description: Google Cloud Document AI is a document processing service that uses Google AI to extract text, structure, and entities from documents, and to classify or split them. It is part of Google Cloud and is used to build document understanding workflows around processors and processor versions.
summary: Google Cloud Document AI exposes one documented HTTP API at https://documentai.googleapis.com/, callable with either a Google Cloud OAuth 2.0 bearer token or a Google Cloud API key; no separate GraphQL, MCP, or standalone CLI surface was found for this domain.
